title: Operations Center
description: Platform health dashboard and operator attention router. Aggregates status signals from all 7 service domains into a single view. Default landing page for the operator console. The operator starts here and drills into specific surfaces based on what needs attention. Cross-cutting: reads from all service domains. No VistA equivalent — platform-native infrastructure governance surface.

dataSources.description: Aggregated health status from all 7 service domains: Tenant Portfolio, Composition, Bootstrap, Fleet, Commercial, Support, Governance.
Active alerts across all service domains, prioritized for operator attention.
Recent platform event timeline: tenant created, provisioning completed, alert fired, etc.
